report.executive_summary: SQL injection vulnerabilities were identified from local probe evidence.

findings.title: SQL Injection in /rest/products/search
findings.evidence: Error: SQLITE_ERROR: near "1": syntax error
findings.recommendation: Use parameterized queries, avoid string-built SQL, and validate inputs server-side.

findings.title: SQL Injection in /rest/user/login
findings.evidence: Baseline returned 401, probe returned 200 with authentication data.
findings.recommendation: Use parameterized queries, avoid string-built SQL, and validate inputs server-side.
